brand.name: StickPro
brand.logo_concept: Text-based 'StickPro' with 'Pro' in Cyan #22d3ee, Outfit font, Bold. Subtle watermark achieved using large Lucide React icons (e.g., Activity, Shield or Hexagon) at 2-5% opacity, fixed bottom right.

headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for all headings. Never center unless it's an empty state.

body.usage_rules: Left aligned, text-slate-300 for general readability.

data_display.usage_rules: Use for statistics, scores, times, calendar dates, and tabular data.

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4), gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.card_padding: p-6 for standard cards, p-8 for large focus areas.

cards.style: Flat background (#111118), 1px solid border (border-cyan-900/30 or border-white/10). No soft shadows. Sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-lg maximum).
cards.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), border turns to solid primary (border-cyan-400), subtle cyan glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,211,238,0.1)]).

buttons.primary: Solid primary background (bg-cyan-400), text-black font-semibold. Hover: bg-cyan-300.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px border border-cyan-900/50, text-cyan-400. Hover: bg-cyan-950/30 text-cyan-300.

sidebar.style: Fixed left, w-64, bg-background, border-r border-border_muted.

empty_states.style: Flex column, centered. Large Lucide React icon (w-16 h-16 text-cyan-900/50), muted text, primary CTA.
empty_states.watermark: Absolute positioning, large scale, 2% opacity in the background.

data_tables.style: Shadcn based. Dark headers (bg-zinc-900/50), 1px border-b on rows. Hover rows (hover:bg-cyan-950/10).

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.

icons.rules: No emojis. Stroke width 1.5 or 2 depending on scale.

images.description: Two players compete in a fast-paced roller hockey game inside a sports rink. Use this heavily darkened (bg-black/80 overlay) for Auth page backgrounds or high-impact hero banners.
Action shot of a roller hockey player during a night game. Good for empty states or profile header backgrounds with an overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all fonts (Outfit, Manrope, JetBrains Mono) are correctly imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the exact primary cyan (#22d3ee) and background colors (#09090b) mapped to CSS variables.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard using tight gaps (gap-6) and exact standard spans.
Refactor the existing sidebar to use the active state styling defined (cyan left border, text cyan) and remove all emojis.

Apply the subtle watermark effect using Lucide React icons (like Activity, Shield, or Hexagon) at w-96 h-96, absolute positioned, fixed bottom-right, text-cyan-500 with opacity-5, pointer-events-none.
Remove any usage of emojis across the app and replace them exclusively with lucide-react icons.
Ensure every interactive element includes a 'data-testid' attribute for testing.
Standardize card padding to p-6 and border to border-white/10 or border-cyan-900/30 across all modules.
